seoTitle: Cadia vs Cairncross — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cadia and Cairncross. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cadia and Cairncross.
heading: Cadia vs Cairncross — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cadia, New South Wales and Cairncross, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cadia has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Cairncross (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cadia or Cairncross safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cadia has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Cairncross scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cadia scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Cairncross scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cadia or Cairncross?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cadia has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
